help.trigger.title: Help and feedback
help.button.label: Help
help.panel.title: Help
docent.greeting.1: Welcome to Science on a Sphere! I'm Orbit, your digital docent — ask me about any topic and I'll find a dataset to show you. Try asking about oceans, climate, hurricanes, or anything else that interests you.
docent.greeting.2: Hello! I'm here to guide you through over 500 visualizations of our planet and beyond. What would you like to explore? You can ask about a topic, or I can tell you more about whatever's on the globe right now.
docent.greeting.3: Hi there! Think of me as your personal guide to Earth science data. Ask me about weather, the ocean floor, space, volcanoes — or just say "show me something interesting" and I'll pick something out.
docent.help:
Here's how I can help:

• **Ask about a topic** — "Tell me about hurricanes" or "Show me ocean temperatures"
• **Explore categories** — "Show me atmosphere datasets" or "What about space?"
• **Learn about what's showing** — "Explain this" or "What am I looking at?"
• **Find related data** — "Show me something similar" or "More like this"
• **Search freely** — Just type any question and I'll find relevant datasets
docent.explain.noDataset: You're looking at Earth with real-time cloud cover. Browse the datasets or ask me about a topic — I'll load something onto the globe for you.
docent.related.noDataset: There's no dataset loaded right now. Ask me about a topic and I'll find something to show you!
docent.related.none: I couldn't find datasets closely related to "{title}". Try asking about a specific topic instead.
docent.category.none: I didn't find datasets in the "{category}" category. Try a different topic or search term.
docent.search.fallbackResults: I didn't find an exact match for "{query}", but here are some results for "{word}":
docent.search.none: I couldn't find datasets matching "{query}". Try different keywords, or ask me about a broad topic like "ocean", "climate", or "space".
docent.search.singleMatch:
I found a dataset that matches: **{title}**

{desc}{qa}
docent.system.respondInLanguage: Respond in {language}. Even when the user writes in English, your reply, dataset summaries, and any captions must be in {language}. Keep <<LOAD:DATASET_ID>> markers and tool-call syntax exactly as specified.
docent.system.respondInLanguageReminder: REMINDER: Reply only in {language} — even if the user typed in another language. Keep <<LOAD:...>> markers and tool-call syntax literal.
docent.patterns.greeting: hi, hello, hey, howdy, greetings, good morning, good afternoon, good evening, sup, yo
docent.patterns.help: help, what can you do, how does this work, how do this work, how does it work, how do it work, commands, options
docent.patterns.whatIs: what's this, what is this, where am i, what am i looking at, what am i seeing
docent.patterns.explain: explain, explain this, explain it, tell me about this, tell me about it, tell me about the current, tell me about what's showing, tell me more about this, tell me more about it, describe this, describe it, describe the current, what does this show, what does this mean
docent.patterns.related: show me something similar, show me something related, show me similar, show me related, show me like this, related, more like this, similar
chat.degraded.quotaExhausted: Reduced functionality — Workers AI quota reached. Suggestions are using offline matching until it recovers.
chat.settings.status.enableHint: Connected — but "Enable LLM" is unchecked. Check it and Save to use AI.
chat.welcome.intro: **I'm Orbit**, your digital docent — I help you find the right dataset for your question.
chat.welcome.hint: Browse the catalog to compare options side by side. Ask me when you have something specific in mind.
chat.welcome.suggestions.seaLevel.label: Sea level rise
chat.welcome.suggestions.seaLevel.query: What datasets show sea level rise?
chat.welcome.suggestions.ndvi.label: What is NDVI?
chat.welcome.suggestions.hurricanes.quer: Show me something related to hurricanes
chat.welcome.suggestions.arctic.label: Arctic
chat.action.compareInBrowse: Compare these side by side in Browse →
chat.error.generic: Sorry, I had trouble responding. Try asking again, or check the LLM settings.
chat.autoLoad.message: I've loaded **{title}** — that's your closest match.{altHint}
chat.autoLoad.altHint: Here are some alternatives if this isn't quite right:
chat.fallback.localDev: ⚠ AI service unavailable — running in offline mode. Make sure `npm run dev` is proxying /api, or configure a local provider in settings.
chat.fallback.production: ⚠ AI service unavailable — showing offline results. Check LLM settings.
